creator: chat95@mbox.kyoto-inet.or.jp
text:
Hello, and thank you FUJISHIMA san,
Your change looks reasonable, so I changed all of them.

> I think copying archives `as is' is allowed by its author so we can
> rip NO_CDROM/RESTRICTED off. I don't know about NO_PACKAGE. Can you
> clarify this situation?
I mailed to info@sciface.com to ask.

> And, I suggest to show message that there are some LICENSE form at
> install time.
I  added following two lines:
|post-install:
|        @${CAT} ${PREFIX}/mupad/LICENSE

I was disturbed by this line of the licence,
|modify, translate, reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble or create derivative works based on the
|Software;
xmupad is the only script which needs the patch, but just only one character,
I asked info@sciface.com that point, also.

Sincerely,
 Nakata Maho

begin 644 mupad-2001-03-01.tar.gz
